trust.notes: Imported from the upstream README, developer setup docs, CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md, OWNERS, and Makefile. `repo.build` and `repo.test` follow the official Helm developer workflow: build with `make` and run the default local checks with `make test`. `main` tracks Helm v4 development and is explicitly unstable; Helm v3 stable lives on `dev-v3`, so branch context matters when interpreting this overlay. Acceptance tests depend on the separate `helm/acceptance-testing` repository and are intentionally excluded from the default `repo.test`. Not maintainer-verified.

Acceptance tests depend on the separate `helm/acceptance-testing` repository and are intentionally excluded from the default `repo.test`. Not maintainer-verified.

repo.name: Helm
repo.description: Helm is a tool for managing Charts. Charts are packages of pre-configured Kubernetes resources.
